01
Where it all began
The night everything changed
Core Memory  ·  Bombay Adda
October 14th,
2022.

I saw your eyes that night.

And I just knew.

Not maybe. Not someday.
Right then — everything settled.
You were it. You are it.

Oct 14, 2022 · Year One Apr 14, 2023 · Year Two
The beginning ✦
The Day
02
The honest part
I owe you this

I saw your eyes on October 14th, 2022, and I've never quite recovered.

Three years have passed since that night. Some of them I got right. Some I didn't — and for the ones I didn't, for every tear I caused and every moment I wasn't there when you needed me, I am truly sorry. You gave me grace I hadn't earned. You stayed when you didn't have to. That means everything.

But onwards and upwards from here, My Love.

I want you to have everything — everything you've ever wished for, everything you've worked for, everything you deserve.

And I will be right there, standing behind you, watching you take on the entire world.
